text.tspan: u2022 if publisher crashes after publishing but before UPDATE,
the same event publishes again on next poll
u2022 consumers MUST be IDEMPOTENT (see Idempotent Consumer)
u2022 each outbox row has a stable ID consumers use for dedup
NEVER LOSES MESSAGES: as long as DB transaction commits,
the event WILL eventually reach Kafka.
u2192 ATOMIC: both rows commit or neither does.
UPDATE outbox SET sent_at = NOW() WHERE id = r.id;
